changesProposed.name: Engine Ventures

verified.name: Engine Ventures
verified.thesis: Engine Ventures invests in early-stage Tough Tech companies developing hardware-based technologies across deep tech fields including biotech, robotics, green energy, agriculture, manufacturing, material science, and quantum computing.
verified.notes: Engine Ventures is the investment/VC arm that spun out as a separate firm in 2023 from The Engine (a nonprofit incubator/accelerator founded by MIT in 2016). The Engine became a 501(c)(3) nonprofit in 2025. Source [4] is not relevant to Engine Ventures and was excluded. Current partners and AUM not explicitly stated in available sources.

changes.current: Engine Ventures invests in early-stage Tough Tech companies developing hardware-based technologies across deep tech fields including biotech, robotics, green energy, agriculture, manufacturing, material science, and quantum computing. The firm spun out as a separate investment firm in 2023 from The Engine nonprofit incubator and accelerator.
